case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC., VS. HARIOMBAPU, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE-CIVIL (TRANSACTION ID # 17059088) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC., A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION
PROOF OF ELECTRONIC SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 17059088) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC., A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: ;IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT DF HARIOMBAPU LLC, ITS AGENTS, SERVANTS, EMPLOYEES, SUCCESSORS IN INTEREST (EXCEPT FOR BONA FIDE PURCHASERS FOR VALUE WHO PURCHASE IN AN ARMS-LENGTH TRANSACTION), OR OTHER PERSONS ACTING ON ITS BEHALF, OR AT ITS DIRECTION, ARE: (1) ENJOINED FROM RENTING OR OFFERING TO RENT ANY ROOMS AT 179 JULIAN AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA DBA THE KAILASH HOTEL FOR A PERIOD OF LESS THAN 7 DAYS, FOR AS LONG AS THE SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL HOTEL CONVERSION AND DEMOLITION ORDINANCE FORBIDS THEM; ETC...(SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS)
